title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Legopets Ltd
body: " Application number 5488  Applicant Lego Holding A/S and Lego Company Limited objected to the name used by Legopets Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 January 2026 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Legopets Ltd is changed to 15989679, Ltd. "
